metadata.notes: Spearman rank correlation between student-side and teacher-side pair cosines over 1000 deterministic random pairs from the held-out smoke_1k test split. Higher = student ranks pair similarities like the teacher does. 1.0 = perfect distillation fidelity.

results.label: MiniLM-L6 (teacher)
results.note: Self-cosine; reference top-right of size–quality plot.

results.label: Student fp32 (pre-QAT)
results.note: Same architecture as the shipped student, no ternarization. Anchors 'distillation alone, no quantization' quality.

results.label: ternlight (emb_int8)
results.note: Ship target. int8 token embedding lookup + ternary linear weights.

results.label: ternlight (emb_ternary)
results.note: Alt ship target. Ternary token embedding + ternary linear. Smallest possible at the current packing format.
